modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to upload or update a PDF on the USD website.

full_description_text: So, the user was trying to upload a new PDF to the USD website. They mentioned needing to update an existing one too. It sounds like they want to create a new item for that PDF. Just a bit of confusion on how to get it done, I think.
short_description: Need to upload or update a PDF on the USD website.
description: So, the user was trying to upload a new PDF to the USD website. They mentioned needing to update an existing one too. It sounds like they want to create a new item for that PDF. Just a bit of confusion on how to get it done, I think.
